/usr/bin/python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
base='http://127.0.0.1:8000'
active=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(base+'/api/sprints/active'))
print('ACTIVE', json.dumps(active))
if active:
    sid=active.get('id')
    issues=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'{base}/api/issues?sprint_id={sid}'))
    print('ISSUES', json.dumps(issues))
PY
